response: The largest film production company in Hong Kong that won the "Best Cinematography" at the 21st Asia Pacific Film Festival is Shaw Brothers (HK) Ltd. This company is well-known for producing films such as *Kissed by the Wolves* and is recognized for its contributions to the Hong Kong film industry. Shaw Brothers (HK) Ltd. was also the producer of the film *Maelström*, which won the Jutra Award for Best Cinematography at the 31st Genie Awards.
